description: Official remote MCP server for managing RunComfy Serverless API GPU deployments and asynchronous ComfyUI image and video inference.

notes: Use a RunComfy API token from https://www.runcomfy.com/profile in the Authorization: Bearer header.

clients: Remote MCP clients that support Streamable HTTP and bearer headers

notes: The hosted endpoint completed MCP initialize and tools/list checks on 2026-07-14.
